conditionalTheorem: If the continuum high-frequency Hardy/Schur estimate ||(I-P_delta)E_Phi f||^2 <= epsilon_delta <A f,f> is proved on H_M cap ker R_global with epsilon_delta <= epsilonDeltaUpper, then the finite low/mid Schur block absorbs this source-inactive tail because epsilonDeltaUpper < finiteLowMidSchurBudget.
remainingAnalyticGap: Prove the continuum Hardy/Schur estimate itself, not just the finite spectral inactive bound.  The numerical absorption margin is positive once that theorem supplies the stated epsilon_delta.
